response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience and possesses strong entrepreneurial and software craftsmanship skills, he lacks the deep, recognized AI expertise and strategic Director-level experience required for this specialized AI Strategy role. His AI experience appears limited to his most recent position, falling short of the required history in leading AI platform strategy and advising enterprise customers.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and microservices.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative and community leadership (Founder of GISCollective, organizing tech workshops and talks).
Hands-on experience with modern cloud infrastructure and deployments (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker).
concerns: Lacks the recognized, deep AI/ML expertise and strategic focus expected of a Director-level Principal Engineer.
AI experience is highly limited and recent, missing a demonstrated track record of building major AI platforms.
Does not possess an advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, which is highly preferred for this role.
